themes.name: Minimal

themes.name: Docs
themes.description: Documentation theme with collapsible sidebar navigation, breadcrumbs, search integration, and a responsive two-column layout.

themes.name: Magazine
themes.description: Bold magazine-style theme with featured hero, category grids, and taxonomy-driven section pages. Great for news and editorial sites.
